# Provenance

This directory is a read-only reference snapshot of `danabrey/espn-college-football-stats`.

- Upstream: https://github.com/danabrey/espn-college-football-stats
- Commit: def7d08e8e91018106747675acad927a9c5955b3
- Tag: 2.1
- Retrieved: 2026-07-12
- Local modifications: None

The application does not run this PHP package in production. It uses this snapshot only to audit endpoint construction and response parsing behavior while implementing equivalent typed Python provider code.
